title: Misleading documentation for userns_mode
body:
The source code states only the value `host` is supported, while correct values are listed [here](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/options/userns.container.html#userns-mode)

https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/e5bfb933a0c0a2103cad192df485a9c68308685b/podman/domain/containers_create.py#L228
